contract_claim: Comment says 'JSON.stringify will throw for BigInt before validation can catch it' — this implies validation does not inspect env string values prior to serialization, but isValidAdapterCommand tests at L126-138 confirm it does validate env string values. If serializeAdapterCommand calls isValidAdapterCommand first, BigInt in env would be caught by validation, not by JSON.stringify. Comment may be incorrect.
